/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wno-narrowing -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-missing-field-initializers -Wno-unused-variable -shared -Wl,-soname,libbrain__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so -o libbrain__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so CMakeFiles/brain__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp/brain/msg/detail/kick__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
